full_text:
Li Bie
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Bie. Nephew of Li Jue, fell out of his saddle at Li Xian’s death and was killed by Xu Chu. Li Bie is a fictional character. Li Bie was affiliated with Li Jue.
